Dear [Anonymized Person],  

Thank you for your message.  

Regarding the delivery estimate, the estimated delivery date is June 27th, which is a relatively long transit period. This may be due to the long holidays in the area from June 22nd to June 25th.  

We will follow up further and seek your support as needed.
